mapper.select: SELECT fl.family_id, pl.line_id, u.user_name, pl.permission_id, p.permission_title, pl.is_enable, pl.created_at FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON pl.permission_id = p.permission_id JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON pl.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT fl.family_id, pl.line_id, u.user_name, pl.permission_id, p.permission_title, pl.is_enable, pl.created_at FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON pl.permission_id = p.permission_id JOIN FAMILY_LINE fl ON pl.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM PERMISSION_LINE pl JOIN PERMISSION p ON pl.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE pl.line_id = #{lineId} AND p.permission_id = 2 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND pl.is_enable = TRUE

SELECT fl.family_id, fl.line_id, u.user_name, p.permission_id, p.permission_title, COALESCE(pl.is_enable, false) AS is_enable, pl.created_at FROM FAMILY_LINE fl CROSS JOIN PERMISSION p LEFT JOIN PERMISSION_LINE pl ON pl.line_id = fl.line_id AND pl.permission_id = p.permission_id JOIN LINE l ON l.line_id = fl.line_id JOIN USERS u ON u.user_id = l.user_id WHERE fl.family_id = #{familyId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PERMISSION_LINE (line_id, permission_id, is_enable, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{lineId}, #{permissionId}, #{isEnable}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enable = #{isEnable}, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO PERMISSION_LINE (line_id, permission_id, is_enable, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.lineId}, #{item.permissionId}, #{item.isEnable}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enable = VALUES(is_enable), updated_at = NOW()
